title: Fix frontend actor authentication to ensure owner principal is correctly passed to backend

requirements.summary: Verify that the frontend actor hook always constructs the backend actor with the authenticated Internet Identity agent, so that msg.caller on the backend receives the real owner principal and not the anonymous principal
acceptanceCriteria: The actor used in all mutation hooks is initialized with the authenticated Internet Identity agent, not an anonymous agent.
No mutation is dispatched while the actor is in an uninitialized or anonymous state.
The principal logged client-side for the actor matches the owner principal stored in the backend.

file_operations.description: Review and verify that the actor is always created with the authenticated Internet Identity agent from useInternetIdentity, never with an anonymous agent. Ensure the actor creation waits for identity to be fully initialized before constructing the actor instance. Add guards to prevent actor creation when identity is null or undefined. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add readiness guards to all mutation hooks (addWorker, addHoliday, markAttendance, ownerAddAttendance, ownerUpdateAttendance, ownerDeleteAttendance, and all other owner-gated mutations) to ensure they only execute when both the actor is fully initialized and the identity is authenticated. Prevent mutation dispatch when actor is null, undefined, or created with an anonymous identity. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Review the authentication flow to ensure that owner login via Internet Identity completes fully before any owner-gated UI actions become available. Add visual indicators or loading states while the actor is initializing with the authenticated identity. Ensure that owner-specific pages and mutations are blocked until the authenticated actor is ready. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

If AuthContext manages any session state or role assignments, ensure it waits for the Internet Identity authentication to complete and the actor to be initialized with the authenticated agent before marking the user as logged in. Add checks to prevent premature access to owner-gated features. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add explicit guards in the addWorker mutation call to ensure the actor is authenticated and ready before dispatching the mutation. Display a loading or disabled state on the Add Worker button until the actor is fully initialized with the authenticated identity. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add explicit guards in the addHoliday and editHoliday mutation calls to ensure the actor is authenticated and ready before dispatching the mutations. Display loading or disabled states on mutation buttons until the actor is fully initialized with the authenticated identity. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add explicit guards in the ownerAddAttendance, ownerUpdateAttendance, and ownerDeleteAttendance mutation calls to ensure the actor is authenticated and ready before dispatching the mutations. Display loading or disabled states on mutation buttons until the actor is fully initialized with the authenticated identity. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
